title: docs(governance): add C2 first canonical approver ratification packet (M5)
intent: Adds the M5 decision-instance packet that prepares the single owner decision required to mint the first verified canonical approver for AUTHORIZED_CANONICAL_APPROVERS. Documentation only — does not name an approver, does not seed the allowlist, and does not change runtime behavior. Instantiates framework §4.1 step 1 (Proposal) and drives framework §5 (Ratification checklist) from C2_CANONICAL_APPROVER_RATIFICATION.md (PR #206). Read-only preparation document; any actual approver seeding requires a separate, isolated commit.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Adds C2_FIRST_CANONICAL_APPROVER_RATIFICATION_PACKET.md: the M5 decision-instance packet for the first canonical approver ratification. Contains the ratification checklist, approver proposal, and owner decision record — all in DRAFT status awaiting owner action.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: C2_CANONICAL_APPROVER_RATIFICATION.md (PR #206) is the general framework document defining the process. This packet is the concrete M5 decision instance that instantiates that framework for the first approver. It does not duplicate the framework; it fills in the first instance of it.

commands_run: git show --stat HEAD -- docs/governance/coordination/C2_FIRST_CANONICAL_APPROVER_RATIFICATION_PACKET.md -> 1 file changed, new file

files.intent: M5 first canonical approver ratification packet: decision-instance document preparing the owner ratification decision for AUTHORIZED_CANONICAL_APPROVERS. DRAFT — no approver named, no allowlist seeded, no runtime change.

architecture_scan.acknowledgement_notes: Documentation-only M5 decision-instance packet. No code, runtime, or governance authority change. Approver allowlist remains empty and fail-closed.
